generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (internal position, unique 64-bit serial code), measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorData
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (internal position, unique 64-bit serial code), measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorData
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (external position, unique 64-bit serial code), measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureSensorData
]

instance TemperatureSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Temperature data transmitted from DS18S20 sensors via 1-Wire bus to RabbitMQ message broker"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQBroker, ScipyLibrary
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed actuator controlled via MOSFETs on PCB for 4A current handling"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan actuator with airflow 0.02 m³/s controlled via MOSFETs on PCB"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs (4A current handling) and optocouplers for signal isolation between control signals and driving currents"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller handling sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit providing stable voltage to thermal incubator components"
]

instance IncubatorContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment of the thermal incubator system"
    base:contains IncubatorContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi4Controller, PowerSupply, PCB, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data ingestion and communication between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance ScipyLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub open-source code repository for model development and community contributions"
    DTDFVocab:enables TwinningProcessService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy flow model with two parameters for thermal behavior prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy flow model with four parameters including heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyLibrary
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation and prediction of thermal behavior using calibrated energy-based models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CurrentTemperatureInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for model parameter adjustment using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through supervisory control logic including bang-bang controller for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatingAction, WaitingAction
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model development, calibration, experimental validation, and iterative refinement of digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature dynamics based on calibrated energy models"
]

instance CurrentTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature values from DS18S20 sensors used for control decisions"
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters for energy flow models used in simulation"
]

instance ModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Iterative improvements to digital twin models via open-source community contributions"
]

instance HeatingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Heating action triggered when measured temperature falls below lower limit (LL), activating heatbed actuator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WaitingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Waiting action during cooldown period (C) after heating, maintaining temperature within upper limit (UL)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan activation) generated by the controller are transmitted via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which interfaces with hardware actuators."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where RabbitMQ facilitates communication between physical components (sensors/actuators), low-level driver, controller, and simulation models, with data flow visualized in Figure 7 of the document."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the digital twin integrates with the deployed physical system for ongoing monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions (e.g., uniform temperature) tested experimentally; residual error minimized via parameter calibration; temperature discrepancies measured up to 7°C before optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for bidirectional data exchange between physical components and digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted entirely on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with RabbitMQ server and all digital twin components running locally on the device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver for device safety, with optocouplers providing electrical isolation between control signals and high-current driving circuits for heatbed."
]
